name: Master's Delicacies
overview: Joo Ah Ran is a mukbang YouTuber, who is deeply traumatized by eating food. She meets Ahn Sul Ha, who is a chef that's passionate about food. They soon get themselves into a housekeeper and house owner relationship.

trailers.title: 날 백수로 만든 사람과 다시 마주쳤다 [주인님 수라상] TEASER｜ENG SUB
